description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, perform a quality assessment on the 4-band Landsat acquisition located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Generate a virtual band named 'spectral_mean' representing the per-pixel average across all 4 bands and a virtual band named 'spectral_variance' representing the per-pixel variance. Create a binary anomaly mask band named 'anomaly_flag' where pixels with a spectral_variance greater than 5000 are flagged as 1 and all others as 0. Save the enriched product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_qa.dim and export the anomaly_flag band as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/anomaly_mask.tif. Document the total number of pixels, the number or percentage of anomalous pixels, and a brief assessment in a plain-text quality report at /home/ga/snap_exports/quality_report.txt.
